allow: PowerShell($found = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\","$env:USERPROFILE","$env:LOCALAPPDATA","C:\\Program Files" -Filter "cargo.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 4 | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName; if \($found\) { $found } else { Write-Output "NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($w = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($w\) { "winget: $\($w.Source\)" } else { "winget: NO" }; $c = Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "choco: $\($c.Source\)" } else { "choco: NO" })

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" -ArgumentList "run" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\l30z\\ricks-textureripper" -PassThru -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\trr_err.txt" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\trr_out.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \($p.HasExited\) { "EXITED early, code=$\($p.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\trr_err.txt" -Tail 20 } else { "RUNNING \(window launched ok\), pid=$\($p.Id\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; "stopped" })

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; Start-Process cargo -ArgumentList 'run' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\l30z\\ricks-textureripper'; Start-Sleep 12; $p = Get-Process -Name ricks-textureripper -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "RUNNING \(pid $\($p.Id\)\)"; $p | Stop-Process -Force } else { "NOT RUNNING" })

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; $log = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-l30z-ricks-textureripper\\e826c8c2-b249-4ac7-9000-f789bfa51d51\\scratchpad\\run.log"; Start-Process -FilePath "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" -ArgumentList 'run' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\l30z\\ricks-textureripper' -RedirectStandardError $log -RedirectStandardOutput "$log.out" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 15; $p = Get-Process -Name ricks-textureripper -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "RUNNING \(pid $\($p.Id\)\)"; $p | Stop-Process -Force } else { "NOT RUNNING"; "--- stderr ---"; Get-Content $log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 20 })

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; $log = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-l30z-ricks-textureripper\\e826c8c2-b249-4ac7-9000-f789bfa51d51\\scratchpad\\run2.log"; Start-Process -FilePath "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" -ArgumentList 'run' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\l30z\\ricks-textureripper' -RedirectStandardError $log -RedirectStandardOutput "$log.out" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 14; $p = Get-Process -Name ricks-textureripper -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "RUNNING \(pid $\($p.Id\)\)"; $p | Stop-Process -Force } else { "NOT RUNNING"; Get-Content $log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 25 })

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; Start-Process -FilePath "cargo" -ArgumentList "run" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\l30z\\ricks-textureripper" -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $p = Get-Process -Name ricks-textureripper -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "RUNNING \(pid $\($p.Id\)\)"; $p | Stop-Process -Force } else { "NOT RUNNING - likely crashed" })
